seoTitle: Beaumont vs Beaumont Hills — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Beaumont and Beaumont Hills. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Beaumont vs Beaumont Hills: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beaumont and Beaumont Hills.
heading: Beaumont vs Beaumont Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaumont, New South Wales and Beaumont Hills, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaumont Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Beaumont (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaumont or Beaumont Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaumont has a flood risk score of 55/100, while Beaumont Hills scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaumont scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Beaumont Hills scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaumont or Beaumont Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaumont Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
